title: Software Problems
drDigitalIntro: Software problems include apps crashing, not opening, or behaving strangely. Common fixes: force quit and reopen the app (Ctrl+Option+Esc), restart your computer, update the app (buggy old versions are a common cause), or delete and reinstall the app. If the operating system itself seems broken, try a Safe Mode restart — hold Shift at startup. Safe Mode loads only essential software, which helps isolate the problem.

playgroundTask.question: the browser keeps crashing every time you try to open it. You've tried restarting. What should you try next?

options.text: Call tech support immediately — it must be a serious hardware failure
Check for a the browser or the operating system update — buggy software versions are a common cause
Delete all your photos to free up space

drDigitalSuccess: Software updates often fix crash bugs — checking for updates is a great second step after restarting.
drDigitalHint: If restarting didn't fix a specific app crashing, what might have changed recently that could cause bugs?
